title: SLEETLY Assorted Color Baubles for Farmhouse Tree Holiday Xmas Decorations for Christmas, Shatterproof Plastic 3.15 Inch Glitter Snow Balls, Ornament Set of 12
features: STYLE: This assorted Christmas ornaments set is a convenient way to add a pop of color and festive cheer to your tree without having to buy each ornament individually.

SHATTERPROOF & SAFETY: Shatterproof plastic bauble ornaments for Christmas trees are durable and safe, especially in homes with children, pets, or in high-traffic areas where breakable glass ornaments could pose a hazard. They reduce the risk of injury or damage from broken glass ornaments, making them a wise choice for homes where safety is a concern.
LIGHTWEIGHT: Sleetly tree ornaments are lightweight, which makes them easier to hang on Christmas trees without causing branches to sag and allows more decorations.

LARGE & SMALL SIZE: When selecting ornament bauble sizes, it's essential to consider the size of your Christmas tree, the available space, and your overall design goals. A well-balanced tree typically includes a variety of sizes and shapes, with smaller ornaments towards the tips and larger ones toward the center. This snowbauble ornament set features 3.15" (80mm) ornaments.

PRE-ATTACHED RIBBON: Ornament ribbon hangers are a convenient and decorative way to hang ornaments on your Christmas tree or throughout your holiday decor. Sleetly bauble ornaments have pre-attached ribbons with metal caps. This makes it easy to hang the ornament directly on the tree without the need for additional hangers.
SET: Set of 12 ornaments. 12 x 80mm bauble ornaments.
description: Shatterproof bauble ornaments for Christmas trees are an excellent choice for households with young children or pets. Traditional glass ornaments can break easily, posing a risk of injury from sharp edges or small glass fragments. Shatterproof ornaments, on the other hand, are made from materials like plastic or acrylic that are less likely to shatter if dropped or mishandled, reducing the risk of accidents. Shatterproof white bauble ornaments are more durable and can withstand accidental drops or impacts better than fragile glass ornaments. They are less likely to break, chip, or crack, which means they can last for many years, allowing you to reuse them season after season. Overall, shatterproof white Christmas ornaments provide a safer and more durable alternative to traditional glass ornaments, allowing you to enjoy the festive spirit without the concern of breakage. Our Christmas bauble ornaments for trees combine the beauty and luxury of real glass with the unbreakable practicality of plastic. Sleetly ornaments for your Christmas tree come in many sizes includes small, medium, large, and extra large.
